headline: Should You Buy, Sell or Hold AMAT Stock at a P/S Valuation of 9.39X?
summary: Applied Materials trades at a premium P/S valuation as AI-driven demand in DRAM, logic and advanced packaging boosts growth across its wafer fab portfolio.

headline: Michael Burry's Chip Short Just Got Wilder: SOXX Went From 43% Above Trend To 60%
summary: SOXX trades 60% above its 200-day average — a record since 2001. Nine chip stocks are even more stretched. Burry's puts now look early.

headline: Elon Musk Plans To Spend Up To $119 Billion On Chip Plant To Take On TSMC
summary: SpaceX plans up to $119 billion on Terafab to take on TSMC and cut Nvidia reliance. Polymarket gives the company 87% odds of 2026's biggest IPO.

headline: KLA’s AI Capacity Constraints Highlight Earnings Power And Buyback Commitment
summary: KLA (NasdaqGS:KLAC) is highlighted as a key supplier as AI driven semiconductor demand strains global equipment capacity. The company, alongside peers such as ASML and Lam Research, is reported to be running at or near full capacity as chipmakers scale advanced AI manufacturing. Industry wide bottlenecks in critical inspection and process control tools raise questions about how quickly new AI focused fabs can be equipped.
